pilot_override.description: Test H_Safe: safety-critical features have elevated absorption vs matched non-safety
pilot_override.pass_criteria: Gemma Scope SAEs loaded, 20+ safety features identified, absorption scores computed for both groups, Mann-Whitney test run

pilot_override.description: Debug steering: verify ||steered - baseline|| > 0, test alpha scaling
pilot_override.pass_criteria: ||steered - baseline|| > 1e-6, absorbed features show different steering response than non-absorbed

pilot_override.description: Validate H1 with seeds 42, 43, 44 to address zero-variance concern
pilot_override.pass_criteria: Non-zero std across seeds, all seeds show absorption > 0.3 for trained SAE

pilot_override.description: 2x2 factorial: random/trained encoder x random/trained decoder
pilot_override.pass_criteria: All 4 conditions complete, Condition C ≈ D (within 0.1)

pilot_success_criteria.h_safe_quick_check: Safety features identifiable in Gemma Scope, absorption scores computable, Mann-Whitney p < 0.3 (signal present)
pilot_success_criteria.h3_fix_quick_check: Steering actually changes activations (||steered - baseline|| > 0), absorbed vs non-absorbed show different response
pilot_success_criteria.multiseed_quick_check: Trained SAE absorption > 0.3 for all 3 seeds, non-zero variance
pilot_success_criteria.h_mech_quick_check: Geometric component (Condition C) explains most absorption

pivot_triggers.h_safe_no_signal: If safety vs non-safety difference is near zero (p > 0.5), H_Safe may not be viable
pivot_triggers.h3_still_broken: If steering still has no effect after debug, accept as negative result
pivot_triggers.all_seeds_identical: If all seeds show identical absorption (std=0), absorption is deterministic geometric
